'''''Jester''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==History==
In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the ''Jester'' observed an attack on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] cargo transfer area in the [[Yrrna system/Legends|Yrrna system]] by their [[Nami]] allies. The Nami were demonstrating the combat superiority of the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]], which they had stolen from the Imperials in an earlier raid with the intent of producing such craft for themselves and subsequently selling them to the Rebels. A retaliatory strike led by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] failed to save the cargo transfer area, but saved the Imperial personnel there from certain slaughter by the Nami. The ''Jester'' took no part in the attack and was ignored through the battle, thus it was able to flee the area with its Nami allies.
